description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular stone pillar set atop a slightly wider, angular stone base. The pillar has a rough, weathered surface with visible natural veining and some faint linear markings, possibly from mineral deposits or urban pollution. The base is lighter in color and appears smoother, contrasting with the more textured and patterned upper section. The top of the pillar is uneven, with a chipped corner and irregular edges, suggesting age or impact damage. Subtle color variations range from off-white and beige to light gray, with some darker streaks and spots. The overall form is monolithic and imposing, making it suitable as a boundary marker or urban obstacle.
description: A tall, rectangular stone pillar with a rough, veined surface stands on a lighter, angular stone base. The pillar is weathered and chipped, with visible natural patterns and color variations.
description_view_0: The pillar appears narrow and tall, with the angular base clearly visible and the rough, veined surface of the stone prominent.
description_view_1: The pillar is seen from a broader side, showing more of the natural veining and some faint colored streaks, with the chipped top edge visible.
description_view_2: The pillar is viewed from another narrow angle, highlighting a dark streak running vertically and the contrast between the pillar and the base.
description_view_3: The broadest face of the pillar is visible, showing a large, relatively flat surface with subtle veining and a chipped upper corner.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on pavement or concrete
attribute_pattern: Natural veining and faint linear streaks, with some irregular mineral deposits and a chipped top edge; patterns are irregular and organic.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with visible chips, surface erosion, and some discoloration from exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with smoother man-made surfaces, often standing alone as a visual and physical barrier in open urban spaces.
